Actions.drop_to_link: Drop a journal entry, page, or action to link
Actions.linked_ref_invalid_item: Only Action items can be linked here.
Actions.practitioners_hint: Who can perform this rote (e.g., Sorcerers, Bards).
Actions.custom_category_hint: A category of your own. Shown wherever this action's category is displayed.
Actions.power_hint: Tags and statuses that typically affect this action's Power. Edit on a hero's copy and drag their tags onto a row to link them.
Actions.success_markup_hint: Free-text Success effects. Use [tag] for a story tag, [status-N] for a status at tier N, [status-] to pick the tier when spending Power, and [tag!] for a single-use tag.
Actions.extra_feats_hint: Narrative bonuses available for 1 Power each.
Actions.consequences_hint: Free-text Consequences. Wrap tags or statuses in [brackets] to make them applicable.
Actions.consequence_placeholder: e.g. You become exposed (or scratch a tag).
Actions.app_drop_hint: Drag an action from a compendium or sidebar here to add it to this hero.
Actions.empty_state: No actions yet. Drop one here, or click "New action".
Actions.drop_only_action: Only action items can be dropped here.
Actions.warn_no_character: Assign a hero to your user first.
Actions.apply_no_actor: This roll isn't tied to a character.
Actions.apply_restore_needs_name: This Restore Success has no tag or status to restore. Edit the action to add one.
Actions.apply_restore_no_match: This character has no tag or status named "{name}".
Actions.apply_failed: Couldn't apply that Success — see console.
Actions.apply_no_target_permission: You don't have permission to apply Successes to {name}.
Actions.apply_weaken_needs_name: This Weaken Success has no tag or status to weaken. Edit the action to add one.
Actions.apply_weaken_no_match: {actor} has no tag or status named "{name}".
Actions.apply_process_no_limit: That limit no longer exists on the target.
Actions.apply_process_addon_limit: Limits contributed by add-ons can't be changed from chat yet.
Actions.no_targets_in_scene: No tokens in this scene to target.
Actions.request_note_placeholder: Anything you want the player to keep in mind…
Actions.request_no_heroes: No heroes in this world to send to.
Actions.request_take_tooltip: Open the roll dialog with this action prepared.
Actions.request_not_owner: Only this hero's player can take this roll.
Actions.power_drop_only_tag: Drop a power, weakness, fellowship, or story tag onto this row.
Actions.power_pick_tooltip: Click to pick a tag, or drop one here.
Actions.power_pick_no_actor: Open this action on a hero to link tags from their sheet.
Actions.power_pick_no_tags: This hero has no power, weakness, fellowship, or story tags to link.
Actions.filter_search_placeholder: Filter by name, practitioner, or example…

advance.action: Increase a progress status 1 Power per tier.
advance.description: Make progress, get closer, push forward.

attack.action: Give your target a harmful status.
attack.description: Slash, punch, lay a curse, shoot.

bestow.action: Give yourself or an ally new abilities using tags.

Effects.category_ally: For Yourself or for an Ally
Effects.category_target: Against an Opponent or a Target

create.action: Create a new object or being using tags.

disrupt.action: Give your target a hindering tag or status.
disrupt.cost: 1 Power per tier, 2 Power per tag.

enhance.action: Give yourself or an ally a helpful status.

extra_feat.cost: 1 Power per additional feature or minor achievement included in the action.
extra_feat.description: Add a feature or minor achievement to an action.

inflict.description: Inflict a status on a target.

reduce.description: Reduce a status on yourself or an ally.

influence.action: Give your target a compelling status.

mitigate.cost: 1 Power per tier; 2 Power per tag.

restore.action: Reduce a harmful status or recover a scratched power tag.
restore.cost: 1 Power per tier 2 Power per tag.

weaken.action: Remove a target’s useful tag or status.
weaken.cost: 1 Power per tier 2 Power per tag.

Settings.hero_limit_hint: The base Limit for hero characters. Lower values create grittier campaigns, higher values feel more heroic.
Settings.use_fellowship_hint: Enable the shared Fellowship actor, fellowship themes, and relationship tags. Disable for solo play or games without a fellowship. Requires reload.
Settings.content_sources_hint: Configure which compendium packs are used for browsing themebooks, themekits, tropes, and statuses.
Settings.content_sources_no_filter: No packs selected — all available compendium packs will be searched.
Settings.content_sources_reset_confirm: This will delete all statuses in the world pack and re-populate with defaults. Continue?
Settings.custom_dice_hint: Use the custom Legend in the Mist dice visuals instead of standard d6s. Requires the Dice So Nice module.
Settings.popout_tags_sidebar_hint: Automatically open the Tags sidebar in a pop-out window on load.

Ui.scene_tag_dialog_hint: Define tags, statuses, and limits for this scene.
Ui.click_open_context_remove: Click to open sheet, Right-Click to remove.
Ui.click_open_user_character:
Click to open sheet.
This actor is auto-added because a user is assigned to it.
Ui.click_to_add_tag:
Click to Add
Shift+Click to Burn
Alt+Click to Scratch
Ui.click_to_add_tag_no_burn:
Click to Add
Alt+Click to Scratch
Ui.click_to_toggle_tag:
Click to Scratch/Unscratch
Shift+Click to Activate/Deactivate
Ui.confirm_delete_content: Are you sure you want to remove this {thing}?
Ui.consequences_only_hint: When checked, this item represents only Consequences without an associated Threat.
Ui.dice_roller_hint: Opens the dice roll dialog if a character is attached to the user.
Ui.warn_no_fellowship: No Fellowship actor found in this world.
Ui.warn_no_backpack: This hero has no backpack to receive tags.
Ui.toggle_edit_mode_hint: Toggles edit mode on the topmost open character sheet.
Ui.toggle_tags_sidebar_hint: Toggles the Tags sidebar pop-out window.
Ui.toggle_character_sheet_hint: Toggles the controlled token's (or assigned character's) sheet. Brings the sheet to the front if it is open behind another window.
Ui.wrap_tag_markup_hint: Wraps the selected text in a text field with [brackets] to create tag markup.
Ui.drag_apply: Drag onto Actors or Story Window to apply
Ui.drop_general_consequence: Drop a vignette here to use its consequences.
Ui.error_no_actor: No actor found. Please make sure the actor exists and is properly configured.
Ui.error_no_backpack: No backpack found. Create a new Backpack item and add it to this hero.
Ui.error_validating_item: There was an error validating the item. Please see the console for more information.
Ui.fellowship_setup_cta: Drop a Fellowship Themebook or Theme here, or click the book icon to browse available options.
Ui.fellowship_no_theme: No fellowship theme set up yet. Click here to configure.
Ui.fellowship_no_theme_edit: No fellowship theme set up yet. Click the edit button to configure.
Ui.fellowship_no_options: No fellowship themebooks or themekits found. Install a content module or create one in the Items directory.
Ui.hero_creation_backpack_hint: Choose 3 items for your backpack. Select 1 as your active item.
Ui.hero_creation_max_power_tags: You can only select up to 2 power tags
Ui.hero_creation_method_guidance: Pick how you'd like to build this theme. Themekits give you a head start, Themebooks guide you with prompts, or go Manual for full control.
Ui.hero_creation_method_manual_hint: Create a blank theme to fill in later
Ui.hero_creation_method_themebook_hint: Answer prompts to craft a theme
Ui.hero_creation_no_themekits: No themekits found. Create themekit items in your world or install a module that provides them.
Ui.hero_creation_no_tropes: No tropes found. Create trope items in your world or install a module that provides them.
Ui.hero_creation_mode_trope_hint: Pick a trope with prebuilt themekits
Ui.hero_creation_themebook_tags_required: Themebook themes require power tags, weakness tag, and quest
Ui.hero_creation_select_themekit_hint: Select a themekit from the list to see its tags.
Ui.hero_creation_select_trope_hint: Select a trope to see details
Ui.hero_creation_tags_optional: Tags are optional — you can fill these in later from your character sheet.
Ui.improve_needed: Mark 3 Improve to select an advancement.
Ui.improvement_locked_hint: Defined by the themebook. Unlocks via theme advancement (mark 3 Improve) or by adding it directly.
Ui.item_transfer_content: Select the tags you want to transfer to your backpack.
Ui.party_overview_empty: No heroes in the world yet. Create a Hero actor to get started.
Ui.party_overview_hint: Opens a summary of all heroes, their quests, weaknesses, and statuses.
Ui.moderate_roll_player_hint: The GM is moderating the roll. Please wait for their decision.
Ui.name_consequence: Name your Consequence. Use [tag name] for tags and [status name-tier] for statuses.
Ui.quick_add_tooltip: Add (Enter). -N for status, :N for limit.
Ui.no_addons: No add-ons applied. Drop one here from the compendium.
Ui.no_backpack: No backpack yet. Add a Backpack item to this hero.
Ui.no_moments_of_fulfillment: No moments of fulfillment yet. Use the + button above to add one.
Ui.no_relationship_tags: Relationship tags appear when other heroes join the fellowship.
Ui.no_themebook_improvements: This themebook has no special improvements.
Ui.no_themes: No themes yet. Drag a theme here to get started.
Ui.story_theme_actor_empty: This story theme has no content yet.
Ui.no_vignettes: No vignettes yet. Drag one here or use the + button to create one.
Ui.warn_fellowship_limit: A fellowship can only have one fellowship theme.
Ui.warn_fellowship_use_actor: Fellowship themes belong on fellowship actors. Link a fellowship by dropping it onto your hero sheet.
Ui.warn_fellowship_not_fellowship: Only fellowship themes can be added to a fellowship actor.
Ui.warn_fellowship_no_delete: The fellowship actor cannot be deleted.
Ui.warn_fellowship_not_character: The fellowship cannot be assigned as a player character.
Ui.warn_backpack_limit: You already have a backpack. Please remove it before adding another.
Ui.warn_story_theme_actor_item_type: Story theme characters can only contain story themes.
Ui.warn_story_theme_actor_limit: Story theme characters can only contain one story theme.
Ui.warn_invalid_effect_target: This effect type cannot be applied to that document.
Ui.replace_general_consequence_content: Replace the current general consequence vignette?
Ui.replace_story_theme_content: Replace the current story theme with the dropped one?
Ui.roll_consequence:
The action Succeeds,
but there are Consequences.
Ui.roll_failure: The action fails or has severe Consequences.
Ui.roll_rejected: {name} has rejected the roll. Please make any necessary adjustments, or close the dialog if you did not intend to roll.
Ui.single_use_hint: Single-use story tag — costs 1 Power instead of 2 (p.165).
Ui.burn_cap_warning: Only one tag may be burned per roll. Un-scratch your other tag first.
Ui.sacrifice_painful_price: Scratch all tags in a relevant theme.
Ui.sacrifice_grave_price: Take a tier-6 status (typically death or transformation).
Ui.sacrifice_confirm_painful: This will scratch all tags in {theme}. This can be undone manually from the character sheet.
Ui.sacrifice_confirm_scarring: This will permanently remove {theme} from your character. This cannot be undone.
Ui.sacrifice_theme_scratched: All tags in {theme} have been scratched.
Ui.sacrifice_theme_removed: {theme} has been removed. You may replace it with a new theme.
Ui.roll_sacrifice_failure: In Vain — You pay the full price of your Sacrifice, but nothing is achieved.
Ui.roll_sacrifice_mixed: Fate — You succeed, but you must pay the full price of your Sacrifice.
Ui.roll_sacrifice_success: Miracle — You succeed, and your Sacrifice is lessened by one level.
Ui.roll_success:
The action Succeeds.
There are no Consequences.
Ui.roll_tracked_success: You may Push Your Luck: accept consequences in exchange for 1 extra Power to spend on effects.
Ui.promise_complete: {actor} has reached a moment of fulfillment!
Ui.improve_complete: {actor}'s theme "{theme}" is ready for an Improvement!
Ui.warn_incompatible_data: The data you are trying to import is not compatible with this system.
Ui.warn_no_character: Please assign a character to your user in the bottom-left player configuration menu.
Ui.warn_not_owner: You are not the owner of this actor. You cannot edit it.
Ui.warn_user_character: This actor is auto-added because a user is assigned to it. Unassign the user to remove it.
Ui.warn_theme_limit: You have reached the maximum number of themes. Please remove a theme before adding another.
Ui.welcome_custom_dice_hint: Use the custom Legend in the Mist dice visuals instead of standard d6s. Requires the Dice So Nice module.
Ui.welcome_popout_tags_hint: Automatically open the Tags sidebar in a pop-out window on load.
Ui.welcome_player_message: Welcome, adventurer! It looks like you don't have a hero yet. Would you like to create one?
Ui.gm_welcome_message: Welcome to Legend in the Mist! Here are a few things to set up before your players join.
Ui.migration_start: Migrating world data — please do not close the application.
Ui.migration_failed: World migration failed — check the console for details.
Ui.hero_creation_hint_power_tags: Power tags should be useful — ask yourself: "What kind of actions would this tag support?"
Ui.hero_creation_hint_weakness_tags: Weakness tags should be limiting — ask yourself: "How would this cause problems for my hero?"
Ui.hero_creation_hint_tags_match_might: Tags should match theme Might: Origin = humble, Adventure = notable, Greatness = grandiose.
Ui.hero_creation_hint_quest: A Quest is a goal, belief, or journey. Think: Your Wish, Your Truth, Your Home, or Your Question.
Ui.hero_creation_hint_broad_vs_specific: Broad tags (e.g. clever) need extra effort to use. Specific tags (e.g. whirlwind slash) are more reliable.
